programme.desc: Fred turns to his son Dustin for help when he uncovers a giant overhanging boulder at The Trifecta on the side wall that threatens to kill any diver below it. But tensions run high once Dustin takes control of Fred's operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Depths of Despair
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys are close to a huge gold cleanup. Ryan faces his worst fears as he dives deeper than ever into a crumbling, narrow 14-foot hole. Carlos finally hits bedrock at Rockfall Ravine and reveals that this dive site could pay out huge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Ride or Die
programme.desc: With their richest site picked clean, Dustin and crew move upstream to 'The Chute' a promising, yet dangerous site with rapids stronger than ever. Fred and crew rethink their operation and adapt the rock drag method to a vertical lift system.

programme.desc: At his new dive site, The Chute, Dustin is overpowered by the raging white water leaving his life in his crew's hands. After heavy rain, Fred's crew fights zero visibility and have a deadly encounter 14 feet underwater.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rookie Mistakes

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Gin Craze
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make gin, a notorious spirit with medieval roots that is still prized in the backwoods today. Judged by legendary shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Don't Sweat It!
programme.desc: Audrey pops the painful bumps that cover her body so she can feel relief. Felicia has a peculiar looking dark growth on her forehead. Krista's excessive sweating is so severe that on any given day she could fill up an entire milk jug with her sweat.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus
programme.desc: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Big Pop on Campus

programme.title: I Am Jazz: I Will Survive
programme.desc: Jazz travels to New York for a third surgery to correct defects caused by complications during her gender confirmation surgery. While in New York, Jazz attends the premiere of a film she starred in. The Jennings family celebrate the twins' 21st birthday.

programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the lake, Whitney and Ryan clash as her friends beg her to ditch him and move back to Greensboro. When Buddy's new girlfriend crashes the party, Whitney worries about losing her 'quarantine husband' to another woman.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: The Buddy System
programme.desc: Wary of being alone in Charlotte, Whitney convinces Buddy to move in with her. With Buddy's new girlfriend taking up his time, however, she finds herself lonelier than ever.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Big Fat Ultimatum
programme.desc: With Chase long gone and Buddy on the fence about staying with her, Whitney considers packing it all in and heading home to Greensboro. When Ryan finds out, however, he throws down a pretty hefty ultimatum, threatening her to stay in Charlotte -- or else!

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Weight-Loss Surgery
programme.desc: While Whitney is undecided about where to live, the Greensboro crew hatches a plan to lure her back home and away from Ryan -- for good. With the fate of the business in jeopardy and her love life in ruins, Whitney faces some tough decisions.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney Gets Her Groove Back
programme.desc: In an attempt to rebuild their shaky relationship, Ryan invites Whitney and her friends to Asheville for a weekend getaway. Whitney consults a doctor about moving forward with weight loss surgery, but it's not without risk.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Big Fat Brawl
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to Asheville, all eyes are on Ryan for possible sabotage, but no one is expecting Whitney and Buddy to lash out at each other. Then, when Whitney tests her stamina on a treacherous waterfall hike.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Big Fat Baby News
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Whitney during an Asheville getaway, but then she discovers Ryan has been keeping devastating news from her. Then, Whitney is shocked by a surprised call from Chase and his baby daughter.

programme.title: Parking Wars: Parking Wars Private Tow Edition
programme.desc: Hawk races to his brother-in-law's rescue when a woman flies into a rage, physically blocking him from towing her car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Steve lays down the law in Providence when a driver tries to use an invalid handicap placard.

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Mike and JoJo go head-to-head with irate residents as they tow cars from a Staten Island apartment complex.

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: James
programme.desc: On November 24, 1990, 15-year-old James killed his stepmother and three young brothers with a shotgun, and then set their rural Wyoming home on fire.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Preston
programme.desc: On March 4, 2010, 17-year-old Preston was one of three teens involved in a murder during an attempted robbery in Fort Walton Beach, Florida. Along with the other teens, Preston was sentenced to life without parole.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Brandon
programme.desc: On August 21, 2001, a group of teens, including 15-year-old Brandon, kidnapped and raped Melissa, a 21-year-old college student in Youngstown, Ohio.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Curtis
programme.desc: On April 10, 1995, in Aurora, Colorado, 15-year-old Curtis was one of four teens involved in the death of Christopher as they attempted to steal his car. After 23 years in jail, Curtis has been granted a resentencing and could soon be released.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Otis
programme.desc: On March 31, 1998 in Albany, Georgia, 16-year-old Otis broke into Valerie's home and allegedly tried to rob her. During the attempt, Valerie and her 16-year-old daughter, Valene, were shot. Valerie dies weeks later and her daughter was disfigured.

programme.title: The First 48: Murder in Pleasant Grove
programme.desc: In Dallas, a dismembered body is found burned in an open field. With no leads on the victim's identity, detectives turn to the public for help in solving this baffling case.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Three downtrodden working stiffs decide to launch their own business, but a slick investor stops them in their tracks. They hatch a half-baked scheme to kidnap the investor's son and demand a ransom, with which they can reclaim their business.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses 2

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: The guys get liberal with lotion down at the shore, shop from other people's carts in a supermarket and try to scam their way to a free dish of yogurt.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Boardwalk of Shame
programme.desc: The guys approach strangers with humiliating one liners on the streets of New York, play a unique word game in a grocery store, and try to get shoppers to hop in a trunk at a car dealership.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: It's a Makeshifte
programme.desc: Find out why Michael had to get scorpion training, what animal the crew chased around a store and where Michael's favourite vacation spots are.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Flash Melt
programme.desc: Find out which trick occurred when a location fell through at the lasts second, and how the producers dealt with screaming kids during a shoot day. Plus, find out who crossed paths with Michael months after being tricked.

programme.title: Modern Family: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: After reconnecting on Facebook, Phil invites his old high school girlfriend to drop by the house but his friendly visit quickly turns into trouble.

programme.title: Modern Family: Starry Night
programme.desc: Phil and Claire each tackle one of their kids' school projects. Meanwhile, Jay and Mitchell set out on their traditional father-son outing to see the meteor showers.

programme.title: Modern Family: Game Changer
programme.desc: It could not be more perfect that Phil's birthday and the release date of a hot new product coincide, and he wants nothing so much as to be one of the first people to get one.

programme.title: Modern Family: Benched
programme.desc: When Luke and Manny's hot-tempered basketball coach quits in the middle of a game, Jay and Phil both jockey to fill the position.

programme.title: Modern Family: Travels With Scout
programme.desc: Claire is caught off guard when Phil's father shows up in an RV with a little four-legged friend. Cameron offers to fill in as a drummer for Dylan's band, and Jay and Gloria suffer the consequences when they take Manny to a traumatizing horror movie.

programme.title: Modern Family: Airport 2010
programme.desc: For Jay's birthday, Gloria gives him the best surprise: a romantic getaway to Hawaii. The only kicker is she invited the entire family to come along. Everyone arrives at the airport, and it's quite a scene, filled with forgotten IDs and flying phobias.

programme.title: Modern Family: Hawaii
programme.desc: A relaxing family vacation in Hawaii gets slightly derailed when everyone has their own idea of fun.

programme.title: Modern Family: Family Portrait
programme.desc: Claire painstakingly plans for a new family portrait to be taken, but it seems like everything and everybody is working against her. Gloria and Manny go with Phil and Alex to a Lakers game and end up having a very awkward moment on the jumbotron.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Wagon
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old station wagon, but not before everyone takes it on one last ride down memory lane. Meanwhile, when Mitchell decides to build a life-sized princess castle for Lily, Cameron calls in Jay for support.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Kiss
programme.desc: Gloria decides to cook more traditional Colombian meals, which is met with some ribbing from Jay. Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mom when she learns that Alex likes a boy.

programme.title: Modern Family: Earthquake
programme.desc: An earthquake hits, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with the plumber. Manny experiences an existential crisis while out with Jay, while Mitchell and Cameron use the quake as a way to get out of a brunch party.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers on a Treadmill
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell help each other spare their significant others from embarrassment. Jay goes to a Quinceañera to prove a point to Gloria, and Haley gives sisterly advice to Alex.

programme.title: Modern Family: Unplugged
programme.desc: Noticing that everyone is too busy on their electronic devices to actually interact with one another, Claire and Phil declare a family challenge to see who can stay unplugged the longest.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween
programme.desc: Claire loves Halloween and is gearing up to make the Dunphy house spooky for the trick-or-treaters. She gives each family member a role to play, but none of it goes quite right.

programme.title: Modern Family: Chirp
programme.desc: Claire and Haley have a bit of quality girl time while they are home together sick. Meanwhile, Phil becomes preoccupied with the taunts of a chirping smoke detector, and Gloria and Manny surprise Jay at work.

programme.title: Modern Family: Manny Get Your Gun
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at a restaurant to celebrate Manny's birthday, though Manny himself is experiencing a mini life crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Claire and Phil decide to engage in a not-so-friendly car race on the way to the restaurant.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Sell or Stay
programme.desc: A couple's giant 1920s home is too much to handle. Electrical issues have rendered the kitchen useless and the home's size creates a lengthy to-do list, but with Nicole Curtis' expertise, they'll be able to enjoy a hot meal together in an updated kitchen.

programme.title: House Hunters: Time's Up in Boston
programme.desc: A buyer in the Boston area has been living with her parents for four years to save for a place. Everyone's eager for her to get out on her own, but her dad's fixation with the safety of these old New England properties is slowing them down.

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Changing the Game

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: What's the Delay?

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: We're Out, Sort Of

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Nothing's Set in Stone
programme.desc: More new family routines and hard construction deadlines challenge the Baeumlers. When Bryan makes an important design decision without consulting Sarah, a worker gets caught in their crossfire and progress is slowed.

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Holidays and weather delays keep the Baeumlers on their toes when they are forced to solve constant issues at the finishing stage. As Bryan and Sarah attempt to finish the exterior of the house, the frustrated electrician also deals with a setback.

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: High(view) and Mighty

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: War of the Weird
programme.desc: Featuring animals fighting another one of their kind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Lost Worlds of the Desert
programme.desc: The decaying remains of a lost military base and the haunting remnants of a forgotten Nevada settlement are now barren wastelands; experts investigate to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Hidden Doomsday
programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Rocky Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Legend of the Nazi Gold
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Secret History of the New World
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Fear Travels Fast
programme.desc: Aurora, Indiana hadn't seen a murder in decades until Leigh Jennings was killed in her own home. Residents are horrified when the beloved mother and hairstylist is found dead. In a case where everyone liked the victim, anyone could be the killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The War Next Door
programme.desc: A family loves everything about their new home except the mockingbirds that perch and squawk in the backyard lemon tree. Their efforts to scare them off start a feud with their neighbors that spins out of control until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Danger in Store
programme.desc: After a bad breakup, single mom Joi Partain finds love again with Jonathan Pearson. But after the couple moves to Ocala, Florida with Joi's daughter, troubles in their relationship spiral until they hit a bloody, brutal point of no return.

programme.title: Shattered: Butcher on Mincey Road
programme.desc: When a woman's marriage takes a violent turn, her daughter seeks refuge at the nearby home of a caring neighbor. She has no idea, however, that the place she considers a safe haven is not at all what it seems.

programme.title: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: Julian Williams disappears after last being seen getting into a taxi. A mysterious text will later reveal what really happened.

programme.title: The Butcher Baker: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a mild-mannered family man ran a bakery in Anchorage, Alaska. Unknown to those who knew him, he also hunted and murdered dozens of women. In a world exclusive, we see inside the warped mind of Robert Hansen with his final taped confession.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: The Butcher Baker: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a mild-mannered family man ran a bakery in Anchorage, Alaska. Unknown to those who knew him, he also hunted and murdered dozens of women. In a world exclusive, we see inside the warped mind of Robert Hansen with his final taped confession.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: Julian Williams disappears after last being seen getting into a taxi. A mysterious text will later reveal what really happened.

programme.title: Twisted: Trail of Fears
programme.desc: California state parks became scenes of violence in 1979 and 1980 as convicted rapist David Carpenter took his crimes to a new and diabolic level, by brutally killing his victims.

programme.title: Twisted: Tampa Bay Slayer
programme.desc: Bobby Joe Long was a brutal and ruthless killer who terrorised women in Florida before his arrest in 1984 where he claimed to have also raped over 50 women.

programme.title: Redrum: Murder, Who Wrote?
programme.desc: David Ford was a police officer in Kentucky. But when he's found dead in his home, police are left wondering who would kill one of their own. For weeks before the murder, David had been receiving threatening notes. Could the writer be the culprit?

programme.title: Redrum: Don't Wake Daddy
programme.desc: Laura Rogers thought she knew the man she married, until the day her husband is found dead in their bedroom - the victim of an apparent suicide. The investigation that follows reveals a man with a deep secret - and a dark motive for murder.

programme.title: Redrum: An Imperfect Family
programme.desc: Rick and Suzanna Wamsley are at odds with their children. When the happy couple are found shot and stabbed to death in their own home at Christmastime, investigators must untie a tangled knot of family conflicts to solve the puzzling case.

programme.title: Redrum: Families and Foes
programme.desc: Reunited with his two sons and living in a new home in Florida, life seems to be back on track for Terry King. But after a few weeks of harmony, a fire breaks out, leaving one person dead and two missing as fingers are pointed at both family and friends.

programme.title: Real Detective: The Riverside Killer
programme.desc: One year into the most demanding case of his career, Riverside Sr Investigator Bob Creed arrives at the scene of the 16th murder in a string of slayings. But this one is different. It's on his grandfather's property where he spent most of his youth.

programme.title: Real Detective: Lambs to the Slaughter
programme.desc: Lake County, FL Chief Investigator Rocky Harris is called in to the most haunting case of his career - the rape and murder of a young girl. Wading through bad police work and dead ends, Rocky is sickened when he uncovers the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Blood Money
programme.desc: The cold-blooded execution of an affable middle-aged couple sends shockwaves of fear through their normally quiet community. Clues are scarce, until Demery and Mayfield uncover a cache of threatening text messages from a pair of mysterious numbers.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: From the Gridiron to the Grave
programme.desc: High School football star Travis Davis is gunned down on the mean streets of the Queen City, sending detective Garry McFadden on the hunt for justice. McFadden discovers a beef from the street might be the lead that sends him straight to his killer.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Overkill
programme.desc: A young woman finds her beloved neighbour, Rebecca Claybrook, beaten to death in her own home. The men in Claybrook's life are put under the microscope by Detective Fil Waters.

programme.title: Home Alone: Inheriting Evil
programme.desc: CeCe Coffee is a Southern Belle with a beautiful home but very little home security. In a bizarre case of mistaken identity, she falls prey to a brutal home invasion that will force her to think on her feet if she wants to stay alive.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Killer Chemistry
programme.desc: Professor Tiffany Maher is a faculty favorite; intelligent and sociable, it's hard to believe that she could have any enemies. But when Tiffany is murdered, investigators discover a secret online life that may lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Open Door Policy
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Mike and Terri Greene hits close to home in Grand Ledge, Michigan. The couple was beloved by everyone in the small town and Mike was a retired police officer. Evidence of a personal grudge, but could the motive so clear cut?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Impersonate a Guard
programme.desc: Dennis Hope, a handsome and intelligent thief, pulls off a series of daring robberies and goes on the run while living a life of luxury. Commuting from Alabama to Memphis.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught Via Email
programme.desc: When Edward Roberson and two fellow inmates went to the showers, they didn't come back. Breaking out, the three scaled the fences and made a run for it. Roberson has escaped and now has stolen guns, in a stolen car running for his life.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Lot of Pot
programme.desc: Moving small amounts of pot from Mexico lead to a bustling operation for Steve Lamb. By age 20, Lamb was part of a group of traffickers who made millions. Eluding the police, Lamb moved bails of marijuana across the sea until caught in a sting operation.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Roll the Dice
programme.desc: With 41 arrests and no convictions, Philip Williams had no worries that stabbing his ex in a parking lot would give him any trouble. But when he became a wanted man, he hit the road. Surviving on his gambling wins, Williams kept on the move.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Eyesore by the Shore
programme.desc: The Eldridge family has lived on Cobbosseeconntee Lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Nevada Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow in Nevada. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Good Eats: Every Grain Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Ancient American grains like amaranth, chia and quinoa are making a comeback due to their versatility and nutritional content. Alton Brown shows how to make the most of these very old kitchen newcomers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce II
programme.desc: No matter how good of a cook you are, sooner or later your seafood is going to let you down. Alton Brown has the sauces that will save your dinner every time.

programme.title: Good Eats: Date Tripper
programme.desc: Alton tells everything you need to know to get dates into your culinary life, including three recipes for the 1960s classic 'Devils on Horseback' and a very 'scrummy' sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the modern city known for its southern hospitality, Atlanta's comfort food is king. From fried chicken and peach cobbler to soul food and sweet tea, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading south.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Reno
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Reno, NV, for a food scene that loves to entertain. He embraces Reno's small town pride as he savors homemade meatballs and ravioli, gets a taste of Basque culture and meets some forward-thinking chefs.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Cleveland
programme.desc: Andrew visits Cleveland for a taste of the city's culinary comeback. He gets nostalgic at the West Side Market, discovers new classics in a 100-year-old food hall and swings by a neighborhood butcher shop that's earning rave reviews.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago Neighborhoods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the neighborhoods that make Chicago a culinary treasure trove. From handcrafted burgers in the West Loop to street-style tacos in Wicker Park and barbecue chicken served up in Bronzeville.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle
programme.desc: Andrew digs into Raleigh, Durham and Chapel Hill- three tasty cities that make up North Carolina's Triangle. A hub for higher education with a booming tech industry, this region is home to a blossoming food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Breadly Combinations
programme.desc: Michael opens up a sandwich discussion and cuts the crust off some 'deli-cut' issues. He finds out if the sandwich was actually named after a guy named sandwich, the correct name for an Italian sandwich.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Thanksgiving Winners
programme.desc: Michael McKean gives thanks for our favorite Thanksgiving grub. He uncovers whether the turkey or the country came first, how burnt marshmallows ended up on sweet potatoes and if a lawyer gave up his career to put cranberries in a can.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: The Kitchen of Good and Evil
programme.desc: Michael McKean separates the good from the bad on some downright wicked food tales. He uncovers whether beer's spirits were put there by witches, if the pretzel is pious or if its story is full of twists.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Eat Your Words
programme.desc: Michael McKean minces words to get to the bottom of some famous food phrases. He finds out if the extra muffin a baker's dozen could save a baker's life, what's really so cool about cucumbers and if you can literally butter someone up.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking our favorite foods up and away. He discovers if there's a scientific reason you may not love airline food.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: State Fare

programme.desc: A new girl comes to school and it's bad news for ZIM.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Backseat Drivers from Beyond the Stars
programme.desc: ZIM and Dib vie for control of the Massive.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Mortos Der Soulstealer/ Zim Eats Waffles
programme.desc: Dib calls upon an other-worldly spirit to destroy ZIM/ Dib tries to capture ZIM on film doing evil deeds, but ZIM just sits in his kitchen eating Waffles.

programme.title: Invader Zim: The Girl Who Cried Gnome/ Dibship Rising
programme.desc: A Girly Ranger gets stuck in a hole in ZIM's front yard, resulting in a media circus; Tak's ship takes on a life of its own when Dib downloads his personality into it.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Vindicated!/ The Voting of the Doomed
programme.desc: Dib is forced to see the skool's counsellor, Mr. Dwicky; It's time for class elections at skool.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fed Up/ Shell Shock
programme.desc: The kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Such Luck/ Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Friendly Face / Big Chibi 6
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Cobra and Mongoose / Better Off Fred
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero Battle / Go Go the Wooweroo
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The New Nega-Globby / De-Based
programme.desc: Globby and Honey Lemon feel guilty about Nega-Globby being trapped in the Glop-Vac. Basemax gets infected with a virus from a spam email.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Fresh Sparkles / Noodle Burger Ploy
programme.desc: When Big Hero 6 find Mr. Sparkles working at the Pizza Party-torium, he tells them he’s decided to leave the world of crime behind. Noodle Burger Boy and the mascots abduct Fred.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kreioke Night / The Mascot Upshot
programme.desc: Krei enlists Big Hero 6 to help launch his latest invention, a karaoke machine he calls 'Kreioke.' Hiro plans to defeat The Mascots once and for all.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Nerds of a Feather
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb attend a Comic Book Convention in Danville and they are excited to show some of their designs to one of their heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kreioke Night / The Mascot Upshot
programme.desc: Krei enlists Big Hero 6 to help launch his latest invention, a karaoke machine he calls 'Kreioke.' Hiro plans to defeat The Mascots once and for all.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What a Croc!/ Ferb TV
programme.desc: When the boys learn that the famous Crikey the Crocodile has gone missing, they set out to find and return him to his home at the Danville Nature Preserve.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: If Books Could Kill/ There Will Be Nachos
programme.desc: Kick challenged a library's return policy after Gunther accidentally brings back a book signed by Kick's idol Billy Stumps. Kick is then determined to crash a party held by Brad, even though he was not invited, in an attempt to score some nachos.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Stumped Again/ The Kick Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Kick must choose between helping his idol Billy Stumps in a monster truck show and helping his best friend Gunther with an important Viking coming-of-age ritual. Kick teams up with Jackie to take a photo for a billboard contest.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Meathead Justice/ Bwar-Mart
programme.desc: After Kick saves the DiPazzi twins' lives, they become indebted to him by their code of ethics. When they do not leave his side, he must go to extreme measures to get them out of his life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: You've Been Brad'd/ Sleepover
programme.desc: After Kick discovers that he is the sole target of Brad's new Internet prank show, he must find a way to avoid his brother and complete an impossible stunt.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: For the Love of Gunther/ Father From the Truth
programme.desc: Kick trains his best friend to be a stuntman when Gunther reveals he has a crush.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Bad Car-Ma/ Goodbye, Gully
programme.desc: Gordie tries to impress his father, Mr. Gibble, by threatening to destroy Kick and Gunther's favorite hangout, The Gully.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Big Mouth/ Last Fan Standing
programme.desc: Kick can't get a wink of sleep when Wacky Jackie and Cousin Kyle throw him a celebration in honour of his latest stunt.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Attic-a/ Free Gunther
programme.desc: Trapped in the attic overnight, the Buttowski men must ban together to survive.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Abandon Friendship!/ Braking the Grade
programme.desc: When Kick and Gunther's parents have a fight, the boys fear their friendship is over and go out to find new friends. Then, fearing he's bound to get bad grades, Kick does everything he can to keep his report card from his dad.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sleepy River Wild/ Power Play
programme.desc: Gunther falls asleep on a waterpark ride/ Kick tries to get out of playing Romeo.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Bwar and Peace
programme.desc: Kick and Gunther venture to the Old Country where Gunther is mistaken for a warrior.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Room/ Dude, Where's My Wade?
programme.desc: When Kick's room is destroyed, Dad grounds Kick and makes him move into Brad's room where he must abide by his older brother's ridiculous rules. Kick and Gunther follow clues to track down Wade when he goes missing before the safety inspector's visit.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Battle in the Skies!
programme.desc: Dante challenges Pheng to a rematch. After the battle, the gang heads to Battle Island to compete in a Blading circuit.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Escape From Phineas Tower/ The Remains of the Platypus
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are inspired by an antique escape chamber to build a computer-controlled tower that allows them to explore the world of escapement. Craziness is going rampant in Danville, but no one has any idea what is going on.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Down the Hill: The Delphi Murders: Part 2

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer at College

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Shopping With a Killer
programme.desc: 8-year-old Cherish Perrywinkle is lured out of a Walmart by a registered sex offender, but that’s just the beginning of a night of terror, all caught on camera.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke to the Fire
programme.desc: Facing more rye and apples than the Laws can run, Josh moves his steamer still to Virginia and Tickle adds smoke to the fire. Mark and Huck help Jim Tom turn cherries into shine. Mike and Jerry risk a huge run in the barn of an unsuspecting farmer.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Mason Jar Shortage
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Mark and Digger's distribution plans are thwarted by a Mason jar shortage. Mike and Jerry return to dangerous land and Tim's scheme to repurpose a massive tank pushes his boiler to the breaking point.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Caught Red-Handed
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Tickle, Josh and the Laws build a winter-proof still site while Mark converts a load of sugar beets into high-proof shine. Later, Mike and Jerry turn their column-distilled liquor into southern pecan liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Digger find a solution to the jar shortage but the juice may not be worth the squeeze. Tim enlists Tickle's friend Howard to help recreate the first whiskey made in America. Mike and Jerry distill vodka from surplus restaurant supplies.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Ultra High Proof
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make a Prohibition-era classic: moonshine up to an ultra-high 180 proof. Building their own stills and mash, only one can be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Digger find a solution to the jar shortage but the juice may not be worth the squeeze. Tim enlists Tickle's friend Howard to help recreate the first whiskey made in America. Mike and Jerry distill vodka from surplus restaurant supplies.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Ultra High Proof

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Trespassers
programme.desc: Duane employs ground-penetrating radar to scan the land near a potential drill site, leading to a mysterious finding. Trespassers prompt Charlie to increase security on the ranch with a camera system, capturing a frightening sight in the dead of night.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Answers
programme.desc: As winter closes in and the digging season nears its end, Duane takes a final shot at getting into the underground cavern, but uncovers a whole new mystery about the land he owns.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters have uncovered a priceless find: a long-lost hoard of Knights Templar relics that could rewrite history. Using cutting-edge methods, they set off on an expedition to reveal the dark secrets behind this mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Curse of the Black Chalice
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters examine their most stunning find: the Black Obsidian Chalice. Together, they investigate the treasure's mysterious origins, decode its strange markings and reveal the secret ceremonies where it may have once been used.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Secrets in the Sword
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters travel to the Holy Land to investigate if their prized sword once belonged to the Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Cutting-edge archaeology reveals a network of hidden tunnels in Jerusalem with ties to the Bible's greatest relics.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Doomsday Relic
programme.desc: A mysterious Templar relic features coded markings that could explain why these once-powerful knights disappeared and why their treasures were buried; using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate their final secrets.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Quest for King Arthur
programme.desc: Josh scours England, Wales, and Scotland to find the real life King Arthur.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: India's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. To find evidence that the golden city is real, Josh dives into the Arabian Sea and visits a dig site that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Genghis Khan's Tomb
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Mongolia's 'forbidden zone' to find Genghis Khan's tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Vanished Empire
programme.desc: On the Mediterranean island of Crete, the Minoans built one of the most glorious civilizations in the ancient world and then mysteriously vanished. Josh Gates travels to Greece to find out exactly how Europe's first superpower disappeared.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Corsica's Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the hidden treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. The search brings Josh to never-explored underground lakes and undersea relics of World War II.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Are You Gonna Marry Liz?

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Chasing Waterfalls
programme.desc: The Johnstons head to Asheville, North Carolina, to spend time with Jonah's girlfriend and her family. The parents push for them to consider their future, but is it too much too fast for the young couple? Then, Alex expands his culinary repertoire.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Who Is Thyself?
programme.desc: Alex and Emma are excited to finally start attending high school classes in person, but being a freshman comes with its challenges. Amber encourages Anna to start substitute teaching while Liz presses her dad to let her start driving.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: A Thanksgiving Ultimatum

programme.desc: Officers and civilians offer testimony of their encounter with extraordinary danger.

programme.desc: A maniac almost hits a group of children waiting at a school bus stop.

programme.title: Most Daring: Craziest Crimes Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Two merciless thugs target a man in a wheel chair, but the attackers are in for a shock when he fights back. Over at the bank, surveillance cameras catch one of the biggest smash and grab heists ever committed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The PB&J Episode
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
