programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Unleashed
programme.desc: Savannah returns home for Jackson's third birthday, she brings her a new puppy. This infuriates Todd. Chase attempts to bond with his dad, purely for his own financial gain.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lights, Camera, Chase
programme.desc: When Chase scores an internship at a local television station, he is forced to deal with some difficult talent, Todd Chrisley. And, looking for a new hobby, Faye and Julie learn Italian.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaway Faye
programme.desc: Todd discovers that Faye has injured her foot on yet another gambling adventure and insists she recover at his house. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie push a reluctant Grayson to take up a hobby.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moving On
programme.desc: In an effort to cheer up Grayson, Savannah organizes a farewell weekend for Grayson and friends. Meanwhile, Chase teams up with BFF Parker for an unexpected get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: As the Chrisley's settle into their new Nashville home, Todd begins to encroach upon Savannah's independence. Meanwhile, Grayson takes up wrestling and challenges Chase to a match.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Smoothie Operator
programme.desc: The family prepares for the Grand Opening of their newly purchased juice bar, but Chase can't take the job seriously. Back at the house, Faye tries to collect on a bet she made with Grayson.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase in Charge
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head to LA for Julie's liposuction procedure, leaving Chase in charge. But when Chase abuses his newfound authority, Todd must return home early to put a stop to Chase's antics.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Todd takes the juice bar employees on a teambuilding excursion, Savannah and Chase get into a disagreement. And when Faye has a health scare, the Chrisley's are forced to come together.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Goat Farm Yourself
programme.desc: Todd sends Chase and Savannah to a goat farm to learn the value of hard work. But things go array when the siblings let their petty bickering get in the way.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Goes Country
programme.desc: While Todd works on a special song for Julie's birthday, he tricks her into planning her own surprise party. But when Julie threatens to cancel Todd's is forced to ask Savannah for help.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hawaii Love You So
programme.desc: Against Julie's wishes, Todd brings the family on their 20th anniversary trip to Hawaii. When Savannah and Lindsie are charged with watching Nanny Faye, they get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Nothing But The Best
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a line-up of the best bits of food with a stuffed pizza crust and arrabiata sauce, orange blueberry muffin tops, 'a little fruit with my crisp' and crispy chicken skins for a CLT salad with simple ranch dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sunday at Chuck and Nan's
programme.desc: The whole family gathers in town for Sunday lunch at Ree's in-law's. Ladd's dad grills chicken a la Chuck while everyone is at church and Ree brings deviled bacon and eggs, pork lover's baked beans and country-style peach slab pie to feed a crowd.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Take Three
programme.desc: Ree Drummond uses just three ingredients in a round-the-clock range of dishes. She makes ham and cheese loaf, an unbeatable penne pecorino, and fried mozzarella makes a perfect anytime snack or appetizer.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Painting Class

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Pygmy Goat Playground

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Rescue Ranch Remodel

programme.desc: Mina and Karen begin work on a home in a new neighbourhood called Garfield Park. With a tight budget and narrow profit margin, the team must harness their creative juices to turn the tiny property into a boho-themed bungalow worthy of an aspiring artist.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic House Gets Pretty Pink Overhaul
programme.desc: After seeing overhaul they did on her parent's house, a woman moving back to Bentonville knows that Dave and Jenny can create her dream home, too. The Marrs use her love of pink to craft the ultimate starter home that she'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Home Again with the Fords: To Honor a Childhood Home
programme.desc: A woman bought the house she grew up in, which is across the street from Pittsburgh's most-celebrated icon: Mr. Rogers. Leanne and Steve preserve her mother's kitchen and sentimental memories, but they also bring her own aesthetic into her "new" home.

programme.title: House Hunters: Doing it for My Daughter in Illinois
programme.desc: A cash-strapped single mother looks to buy her first home in Zion, Illinois. She's looking for a home with two bedrooms and a yard for her 11-year-old daughter's dog, but her fear of taking on projects will make it difficult with her small budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A True Purpose in Da Nang
programme.desc: A husband and wife decide to follow their true purpose as nomadic artists and move to Da Nang, Vietnam. She's looking to experience the local culture in a small, studio space, but he wants to be in an expat neighborhood in a larger apartment.

programme.title: House Hunters: The Clock Is Ticking in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple is ready to find something long term after years of building and selling homes in Ohio. He wants to be in country and she is tired of renos and wants something move in ready.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Hitting Reset in the Costa Rican Rainforest
programme.desc: After going through a divorce, a young professional is ready for a complete reset in the Osa Region of Costa Rica. She's looking for a remote, open concept home with a pool and enough outdoor space to build a yoga deck.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Self Made Mansions: Comfy Kombucha
programme.desc: Clinton helps The Comfy co-inventor Brian Speciale and Better Booch Kombucha creators Ashleigh and Trey Lockerbie find their dream homes. Brian sold $70 million of sweatshirt blankets in two years, and the Lockerbies sell $6 million of their drink yearly.

programme.title: Self Made Mansions: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly helps Jeresha White, creator of the Success Souvenirs Child Development Center childcare empire, and Travis and Cathleen Rivera, owners of the nationally renowned Black and Brass Coffee Roasting Co., find the homes of their dreams.

programme.title: Self Made Mansions: Against the Odds
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly helps Derrek Burr, owner of Kwik-Hang, and his wife Chelsea search for the house of their dreams. Derrek turned his late father's no-drill curtain rod bracket into a brand that has sold over $8 million of these brilliant tools so far.

programme.title: Self Made Mansions: Cotton and Steel
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly helps entrepreneurs behind Extreme Plates and Fresh Clean Tees find their dream homes. The Folletts bring in $4 million a year with their steel construction plates, and the Parvises' t-shirt subscription service has hit $20 million in sales.

programme.title: Self Made Mansions: Cookie Cutter Home
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly helps The Cut Buddy's Joshua Esnard and The Cookie Department's Akiva and Elannah Resnikoff search for dream homes. Joshua has netted $5 million from his grooming tools, while the Resnikoffs have sold millions of their Keto-friendly cookies.

programme.title: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Hosts Brian Patrick Flynn and Tiffany Brooks infuse a three-story Cape-Cod with coastal-preppy flair in Portsmouth, Rhode Island. This incredible home and all its furnishings, a motorhome and $250,000 will all be given away to one lucky winner.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul

programme.title: NCIS: House Divided
programme.desc: Two months after Gibbs and McGee were last seen fighting an elusive group of rebels in a Paraguay jungle, the NCIS team in D.C. tirelessly searches for their missing colleagues. Also, Vance and Torres are summoned to a congressional hearing.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A War Zone
programme.desc: Intelligence is tasked with tracking down the dealers of fentanyl, a drug that has been linked to multiple overdoses around the city. As they investigate possible sources, the team uncovers a series of dealers in a college smuggling ring.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Some Friend
programme.desc: After receiving a complaint, Burgess and Sorensen find the body of a young girl inside a baseball player’s home. There is conflict in the case when it is determined the player is friends with Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes
programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Shot Heard Round the World
programme.desc: After two officers are murdered by a highly trained and knowledgeable killer, Voight struggles to keep the case contained. At the same time, Lindsay confronts Antonio about his new job.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Bury This Case
programme.desc: Severide is brought in for questioning after his car is found to have caused a deadly accident. As the investigation gets underway, the team uncovers a group of car-jackers may be the key to Severide's innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman is found with multiple gunshot wounds, Intelligence discovers this case may be connected with several other cases, and they uncover a serial killer is working in Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
programme.desc: When a mutilated sex offender is found dead, it is unclear if he was the victim of a crime. As intelligence questions those related to the case, they find themselves up against a special police force that may be covering up illegal activities.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Snapped: Shellye Stark
programme.desc: A former teacher’s plea of self-defense is called into question when secrets about her sordid secret work life are revealed.

programme.title: Snapped: Keisha Jones
programme.desc: A woman runs over her husband and claims it’s a tragic accident, but video evidence calls her innocence into question.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Master Obsession

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Jealousy's a Killer
programme.desc: A single mom is doing all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet. But when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Single Mom, Double Life

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Newlywed Newly-Dead

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon: Where Is She
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of "Phoenix sightings," since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated. A surprising lead takes us to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Cesar takes on three dogs whose obsessions have led to a disquieting life for both the canines and their owners.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bull-Whipped
programme.desc: Cesar travels to Santa Barbara to meet Hugo, a 3-year-old bulldog with a mean streak. After a full day with him, Cesar realizes there is no quick fix for Hugo's aggression so it's off to rehab at Cesar's Dog Psychology Center.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Army Brats
programme.desc: Cesar reports for duty at Fort Hood, Texas, to help members of the U.S. Army and their families. Though the army has a reputation for strict discipline and following orders, that is not always the case with military dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounded by Fear
programme.desc: Cesar helps dog-fearing humans overcome their phobias and overcome their anxiety when they're around dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mascot Mayhem
programme.desc: A hyper dog is made into an exemplary mascot with Cesar's help.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Un-Bee-lievable
programme.desc: The tough Michigan winter has finally broken, and local animals are abuzz in the warmer weather.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goodnight Mooooooon
programme.desc: From unplanned pregnancies and long labors to mystery symptoms and power outages, the vets at Pol Veterinary Services have their hands full!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mommy Reindeerest
programme.desc: Early springtime in Michigan means mothers, including Diane Pol, are being celebrated across the state.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Alpacapalooza
programme.desc: The doctors are busy taking care of the rural Georgia animal population.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ancient Outback Murder
programme.desc: A fractured human skull discovered in the Australian outback shows signs of violent trauma and a mysterious execution; experts use digital scanning technology and forensic analysis to reveal evidence of an unexpected, ancient murder weapon.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Skulls of the Supernatural
programme.desc: A select assortment of ancient crystal skulls obtained by distinguished museums are believed to possess supernatural, otherworldly powers; experts investigate if these artifacts are genuine or if their mystical properties are elaborate fabrications.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Skulls of the Supernatural
programme.desc: A select assortment of ancient crystal skulls obtained by distinguished museums are believed to possess supernatural, otherworldly powers; experts investigate if these artifacts are genuine or if their mystical properties are elaborate fabrications.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Mystery on Easter Island
programme.desc: Archaeologists have struggled for centuries to understand the ancient moai statues of Easter Island and the purpose behind their mysterious placement; now, experts use cutting-edge tech to finally reveal the hidden logic behind their cryptic locations.

programme.title: Unearthed: Terror in the Torture Tower
programme.desc: Decoding the mysteries behind iconic structures and monuments around the world.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Floating Pyramid
programme.desc: Surrounded by a mysterious trench, only one Egyptian pyramid was ever constructed to look like it floats on water; using pioneering drone-scanning technology, experts decode the ancient secrets of the pharaoh that are locked inside its hidden tunnels.

programme.title: Unearthed: Legend of King Midas
programme.desc: King Midas and his legendary golden touch is one of the most famous tales in Greek mythology; now, using advanced archaeological methods, experts travel deep inside mysterious ancient mounds to investigate the truth behind the myth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Sunken Empire
programme.desc: The secrets of the world's oldest sunken city are lost to history, but hi-tech underwater archaeology answers questions that books cannot. Experts explore sunken ruins and reveal new discoveries about one of the first great empires.

programme.title: Unearthed: Sumerian Pyramid of Death
programme.desc: Deep in the Iraqi desert, the world's only ziggurat towers over the remains of the first civilization ever known in human history; armed with pioneering satellite imagery, experts investigate the dark mysteries behind this massive, ancient structure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Coal Mine
programme.desc: A rusting industrial complex deep in the woods was once a cornerstone of American business empire, but today, it sits deserted; experts reveal the secrets of this prosperous town's ruin.

programme.title: Titanic: Conspiracy of Failure
programme.desc: New evidence is revealing fresh twists to the fatal chain-of-events that caused the Titanic to sink, and using cutting-edge technology and the latest scientific methods, experts investigate the secret history of its infamous sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Beyond the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Film director Adrienne Shelly is discovered hanging by a bed sheet from the shower rod in her bathroom. It looks like a suicide, but her husband insists it was murder. And detectives are starting to believe him...

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Kensington Strangler
programme.desc: Elaine Goldberg's body is found in a vacant lot in Philly's ' Badlands,' police believe they discovered a prostitute who had overdosed; but when two more bodies are discovered in the same part of town, detectives fear there may be a serial killer loose.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder in the Wetlands
programme.desc: In the coastal town of Leland, North Carolina, a young mother is found dead in a swamp after she was reported missing just days before. As detectives speak with the victim's friends and family, they begin to unravel the truth behind a horrifying murder.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Young Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: They are head over heels in love with their whole lives ahead still ahead of them, but then they die suddenly under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Murder on Prom Night
programme.desc: A survivor deals with the trauma after her stepbrother is convicted of killing her family in order to go to the prom.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Young Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: They are head over heels in love with their whole lives ahead still ahead of them, but then they die suddenly under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Love, Greed and Murder
programme.desc: Patricia Siler thinks she's married into a family of wealth and status when she weds Tom Allanson. But when Tom is disinherited, Pat's dreams are dashed and two generations of in-laws find themselves victim of her deadly wrath.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Fatal Obsession
programme.desc: When 19 year-old Alyssa Austin marries 32 year-old Patrick Horath she feels she's found the man of her dreams, despite her family's disapproval. But no one could have guessed that bringing this man into her family would ultimately lead to murder.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Hitmom
programme.desc: When Sueanne Hobson weds a widower with a son, life seems perfect. But looks can be deceiving. Behind closed doors, Sueanne's relationship with her stepson is in turmoil. Before long, she decides the only solution is to make him disappear forever.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Beyond Repair
programme.desc: Twenty-six year old blonde beauty, Leah Ward, brings sparkle back into the eyes of 40-year old divorcee and entrepreneur, Ejaz Ahmad. But when Ejaz disappears only months later, it's his young son who leads the path to a grisly discovery and murder.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Bye Bye Baby
programme.desc: Deep-seated envy between two pregnant sisters leads to a twisted murder plot in an unsuspecting Midwestern town. This unspeakable crime leaves the Merrifield family destroyed forever.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Letter
programme.desc: A mysterious letter surfaces and contains a shocking twist in a homicide investigation. An entire family is impacted by the bombshell police uncover.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Family Curse
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take a dark turn. Soon small lies and thievery give way to a global crime spree where the twins exploit the vulnerabilities of others in a cruel and twisted game.

programme.title: Motives & Murders: Not Again
programme.desc: An all-American wife and mother is discovered naked and strangled to death in a nearby swamp. The investigation stalls until a random love triangle provides a clue to finding her killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Murder Down Memory Lane
programme.desc: When a 5-year old describes her mother's killer as a 'ninja' police determine the truth about the child's description as they put the surprising killer behind bars.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Married to Death
programme.desc: After a wild Christmas party, Ed Amos wakes to find his wife, Bobbe dead from an apparent cocaine overdose. When her toxicology report suggests foul play, detectives dig into their pasts to uncover greed, secret love affairs, and suspicious deaths.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Deadly Drive
programme.desc: The investigation into 26-year-old Kim Medlin's mysterious disappearance reveals secrets that shatter the safety and security of everyone in the tight-knit town of Monroe, North Carolina.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Demo, Digging and Dancing
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house while dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Budget Bungalow
programme.desc: Michael sees potential in what once was a Victorian bungalow that has been eaten away by termites leaving catastrophic damage.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas 'Cue-Step in Georgia
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in the Peach State visiting two self-taught pitmasters who smoke tasty Texas-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light My Latin Fire
programme.desc: Roger Mooking fires up two delicioso Latin-inspired feasts. In St. Augustine, Fla., Roger meets Nick Carrera, a grill master and grill maker behind Urban Asado. They roast whole lambs and vegetables on Nick's asado crosses.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meatloaded Makeovers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon starts with Vietnamese fusion dishes like juicy, tender shaking beef and mini shrimp-stuffed pancakes. In Colorado Springs, an Asian-inspired duck burger gets a wonton topper, and a meaty take on a classic PB and J.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Rockin' Deals in Memphis

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mealin' and Dealin' In Michigan
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting down the best deals in Ann Arbor, Michigan.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chowin' Down in Cleveland

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Jamaica
programme.desc: Tony attempts to discover the real Jamaica. A country plagued by gang violence, poverty and political strife; poet Mutabaruka joins him for part of the tour.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Hampshire Seacoast
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores New Hampshire's seacoast and finds that the bounty of the local waters is the star of the local cuisine, such as shrimp, scallops and haddock stuffed in a baked lobster and loaded into a chowder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bay Area
programme.desc: California's East Bay area is a thriving multi-ethnic community. Andrew Zimmern highlights the culinary hot spots where Chinese Dim Sum, Indian Pani Puri, American Soul food and Mexican tacos are being served up in traditional style.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern returns to the European epicenter of fashion, art and commerce. Paris is home to rich and masterful cuisine, and Andrew finds the best places to get everything from traditional pot au feu topped with with bone marrow to fresh steak tartare.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Atlanta
programme.desc: We're headed to Atlanta, one of the largest cities in the South, for some of the best things we ever ate. From barbecued rib tips and top-secret burgers, to 'angry' mussels that will make your day.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England
programme.desc: We're in New England, the birthplace of the American Revolution, for some of our favourite food. We sample Boston cream pie, sticky buns, and Szechuan sliced fish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Public Enemies

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Vlad returns and provides a special bonding opportunity for Danny and his mom Maddie.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Life Lessons
programme.desc: Danny and Valerie are forced to work together in order to beat Skulker in the Ghost Zone.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: The Million Dollar Ghost
programme.desc: When Vlad Masters' ghost portal explodes, he schemes to replace it by stealing Jack Fenton's portal. As a distraction, Vlad anonymously offers a million dollar bounty to eliminate Danny.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Control Freaks
programme.desc: Danny turns evil under the control of Freakshow, ringmaster of a ghostly circus.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Memory Blank
programme.desc: After Danny and Sam get into a fight, she wishes she'd never met him.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Doctor's Disorders
programme.desc: The kids of Casper High develop a mysterious illness that gives them ghost powers.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Pirate Radio
programme.desc: A group of ghostly skeletons under the command of a bratty 10-year-old pirate named Youngblood attacks FentonWorks and steals the ghost shield. Soon after, all the adults in Amity Park are packing for a cruise without their kids.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: A new and improved Technus returns, prompting Danny to split into two selves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hand-Me-Downer/ Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: The Loud House: Change of Heart/ Health Kicked
programme.desc: Clyde, desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, enlists Leni's help. Worried that Mom and Dad are hurting their health from not being active, the kids encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: DuckTales: They Put a Moonlander on the Earth!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Fresh Sparkles / Noodle Burger Ploy
programme.desc: When Big Hero 6 find Mr. Sparkles working at the Pizza Party-torium, he tells them he’s decided to leave the world of crime behind. Noodle Burger Boy and the mascots abduct Fred.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: When Worlds Collide/ Road to Danville
programme.desc: Discovering that a strange planet is hurtling directly towards Danville, Phineas and Ferb set out to avert a disaster, while Buford looks forward to making contact with its alien race. Dr. Doofenshirmtz hopes to steal the world's largest ball of twine.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Attack of the Bones
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Backflip or Bust
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays: S'nailed It
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Let's Take a Quiz/ At the Car Wash
programme.desc: Candace wants to win popularity by going on Phineas and Ferb's TV game show. Later, an automatic carwash is created to help Isabella and the Fireside girls meet their fundraising goals.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Day of the Living Gelatin!/ Elementary, My Dear Stacy
programme.desc: Pool filled with bouncy gelatin and it comes to life; later family takes trip to England.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheer Up, Candace/ Fireside Girl Jamboree
programme.desc: Candace is down after Jeremy cancels their date/ Candace hopes to join the Fireside Girls.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Split Personality/ Brain Drain
programme.desc: Candace accidentally gets hit by a 'splitter' ray which causes her to have two different personalities: Romantic Candace and Busting Candace. Then, Phineas and Ferb are sick with a cold, so they create a live television feed to their friends' homes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Spin! Advance! Survive!
programme.desc: Dante takes on a member of the Risen 3 on his first roll in the Blading circuit. Meanwhile, Arman is already ahead of the pack.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Skiddley Whiffers/ Tour de Ferb
programme.desc: The boys build a giant version of a childhood game, using Danville as the central location. Candace ends up playing along with them so that she can carry on her title of 'Skiddley Whiffers Queen.' Doofenshmirtz tries to deal with Vanessa growing up.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: Phillip Stroh and his young British accomplice edge closer and close to their end game, while Lt. Provenza continues to push Asst. Chief Leo Mason into pouring more resources into the case. Rusty digs up an important clue.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Jane and Maura must put aside their differences when they investigate the case of a college student who died in a tunnel. Meanwhile, Frankie Sr. returns with news that upsets Angela.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Murder in the Church

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hot on the Heels
programme.desc: The game wardens are on the lookout for over eager sportsmen trying to bend the rules as the season comes to close. One warden catches a Canadian posing as an American while others bring a fugitive to justice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Takedown
programme.desc: As sportsmen arrive to take part in Maine's big game season, the wardens keep a watchful eye for night hunters and track down a deer poacher. Then, some hunters from out of state get a lesson in Maine's hunting laws.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Autumn's arrival brings hunters heading for the woods, keeping the wardens busy. While some obey the rules, others try to get around them. Sergeant Simmons and Warden McKenney investigate a poached moose.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Sly Squatters
programme.desc: Tensions run high when an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that may be linked to a cold case. A team is deployed to help local police find a missing teen, while a group of sly squatters attempt to hide from local law enforcement.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Squirrel Shakedown
programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Sly Squatters
programme.desc: Tensions run high when an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that may be linked to a cold case. A team is deployed to help local police find a missing teen, while a group of sly squatters attempt to hide from local law enforcement.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: A stolen ATV steers Parker through a maze of suspects. Carter races to a domestic violence dispute. Marquis and Fitzpatrick set up a sting for a suspected night hunter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Buck Fever
programme.desc: In the final week of Maine's deer season, some hunters are desperate to bag a buck. Warden Robertson confronts a felon with an illegal gun and a pile of bait. Warden Carter investigates teen hunters terrorizing a neighborhood.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Homecoming
programme.desc: The game wardens bring closure at long last to one of the most confounding mysteries in Maine Warden Service history. They later reflect on their years of service.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: The wardens encounter all types of people willing to stretch the truth to get out of hot water. Warden Parker searches for a trigger-happy shooter in a family neighborhood. Sergeant Spahr and Warden Lounder investigate a suspiciously shot turkey.

programme.desc: Steve turns the camera around to introduce the photographers who film his adventures.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Tigers of Shark Bay

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Meditating Maple

programme.desc: Investigators in Prince George's County, Maryland are chasing the shadow of a brutal killer who is targeting mothers and daughters. The investigation brings them face to face with a predator, unlike anything they have encountered before.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: The Buried Truth
programme.desc: After the battered body of a young woman is found dumped at a landfill in Lubbock, Texas detectives race to collect evidence hidden in acres of trash. The elusive killer's attempt to bury the truth might hold the key to unlocking the mystery.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: A Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Investigators in Prince George's County, Maryland are chasing the shadow of a brutal killer who is targeting mothers and daughters. The investigation brings them face to face with a predator, unlike anything they have encountered before.

programme.title: The Disappearance of the Millbrook Twins
programme.desc: Former federal prosecutor Laura Coates and former homicide detective Page Reynolds attempt to unravel the mysterious unsolved case of the disappearance of the Millbrook Twins.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House on the Lake
programme.desc: Stranger than fiction, a mom suddenly vanished. A dad under suspicion. There was no body, no weapon, no eyewitness and surprises along the way. Now, after all the twists and turns of four murder trials, the final verdict is in.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House On Sidney's Cove
programme.desc: Nique Leili was juggling family and a thriving career. Then, she vanished. Police found something unusual: Nique's last months were recorded on security cameras around her home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Out There in the Dark
programme.desc: Brandy Daniels believed someone was stalking her. Then, the single mother was found slumped over in her car, shot dead. Investigators would spend years navigating the twists and turns searching for her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Sam and Danielle Dreher appeared to have a storybook marriage but this ending was not happily ever after. When Sam was murdered, investigators discovered a twisted tale of secrets, lies and infidelity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Graduation Night
programme.desc: It started with a party, high school seniors celebrating graduation. Before the night was through, one man was dead and two teens were facing a long fight for justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Written In Blood
programme.desc: When Karen Pannell was found stabbed to death, a message scrawled in blood seemed like a beacon that could lead detectives to her killer. But what exactly did it mean? It would take a dogged forensic specialist with a keen eye to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Bala
programme.desc: Gloria becomes involved in the dangerous world of cross-border crime. In order to survive, she finds a power she never knew she had. Relying on all of the cunning and strength she can muster, she fights her way out.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Legends of the Mall

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Hawkening: Look Who's Hawking Now

programme.title: What on Earth?: Satan in Siberia
programme.desc: A satanic symbol points to an army of the dead in Siberia. A massive stone giant's in a remote desert. Evidence of a Russian doomsday device is right on America's doorstep. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lake of Blood
programme.desc: Six breathtaking images reveal six unfathomable mysteries.

programme.title: When We Left Earth: The Nasa Missions: Ordinary Supermen
programme.desc: Mercury astronauts and engineers need to figure out how to launch a man into space on top of a converted intercontinental ballistic missile.

programme.title: When We Left Earth: The Nasa Missions: Friends and Rivals
programme.desc: Mercury astronauts launch pioneering missions into space. Project Gemini achieves first spacewalk and rendezvous. Featuring newly remastered film from NASA's vault and told by the astronauts and engineers who were there.

programme.title: When We Left Earth: The Nasa Missions: Landing the Eagle
programme.desc: A fire kills three beloved astronauts. NASA rebounds, launching men into deep space and landing Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin on the moon.

programme.title: When We Left Earth: The Nasa Missions: The Explorers
programme.desc: NASA rebounds from the Apollo 1 tragedy with missions into deep space and landing twelve men on the moon. Skylab astronauts live in space.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen Innocence
programme.desc: On a chilly winter morning in St. Louis, an eleven year old girl vanishes. Days later her body is found along an icy river bank. She's been brutally murdered. It's a race against time for investigators who fear the elusive killer will strike again.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Wrath of Love
programme.desc: Zach Sanders is being pulled in two directions between the woman he loves and his mistress who refuses to let him go. Jealousy, obsession and news of a surprise engagement leads to a deadly case of road rage.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Wheeling and Dealing
programme.desc: Feb. 24, 1996, Frank Black Jr., the owner of a school bus company, goes missing. The FBI needs to determine if he is dead, and where's his body? It's a mystery built on lies that can only be solved when someone is brave enough, to tell the truth.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Flames of Fury
programme.desc: When firefighter Chip Taylor's house goes up in flames, investigators soon find that the fire was intentionally set to cover up the triple homicide of Chip, his wife, and her young daughter.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: James is a Marine living the American dream. His duty often takes him away from home, but he still provides for his family. While away his wife seeks companionship closer to home. A sordid affair culminates in an explosive revelation.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Reputations Matter
programme.desc: Rebecca Simpson lives a picturesque, luxurious life with everything she could ever want. Yearning for more excitement, she begins an affair that ultimately puts her life in a downward spiral filled with jealousy, obsession and a thirst for murder.

programme.title: Disappeared: Into the Mist
programme.desc: Stephanie Crane, aged 9, walks home from the local bowling alley-but never arrives. Early leads go nowhere. For years authorities don't find her or make an arrest. Now, they hope that advances in evidence testing may finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Last Summer
programme.desc: When 15 yr-old Kayla Berg isn't home after a night out, her loved ones believe she's staying with friends. But when six days pass and the aspiring gymnast is missing, the details of her last known whereabouts raise suspicion in a close-knit town.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Beneath the Stairs
programme.desc: Curiosity overcomes new homeowners when they spot a barrel in a crawlspace. When they open it, they are horrified to find a body.

programme.title: To Catch a Killer: When a Killer Calls

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Secrets on the Lake
programme.desc: In 2000, 31-year-old Mike Williams vanished while duck hunting on a Florida lake. His boat and his shotgun were found, but not his body. Seventeen years later, a violent kidnapping led detectives to suspects who had been there all along.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Footsteps in Blood
programme.desc: A man calls 911 when he finds blood inside a friend's home. Officers enter to find a beloved community activist shot dead. Detectives piece together clues bloody footprints, bullet fragments, a credit card trail to find a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Such a Pretty Girl
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Carrie Jopek has disappeared. For her terrified friends and family, she seems to have vanished into thin air. But soon after, her body is found underneath a neighbour's porch -- which sets off a hunt for her killer that spans decades.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A man is viciously murdered less than one month after arriving from the Phillpines to join his resettled wife in Calgary. Detective Thomas Barrow always prided himself on being able to read people, but is haunted when his instincts fail.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.desc: Landscape architect Greg Lombardi presents a yard plan with traditional and modern elements. Tom shows Kevin how he's gotten rid of the steps to the roof deck. Roger arrives to tackle the stump of the old Norway maple with a chainsaw and a stump grinder.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Exterior Improvements
programme.desc: Mason Mark McCullogh repoints the old brick foundation with great care and a type N mortar. Kevin visits Community Rowing to see how they make the Cambridge pastime of rowing available to everyone, including kids, disabled vets and general contractors.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Old and New in Harmony
programme.desc: Roger replaces the concrete front walk with new bluestone design. Architect Michael Kim shows Kevin how he also planned a modern house inside the shell of an old home in Brookline and how modern and traditional live in harmony.

programme.desc: Disabled policewoman's townhouse has more problems than she can handle.
